channel.title: Shravan Goswami
channel.description: Software developer and open-source contributor writing about tech, cinema, philosophy, and the things that make us think.

item.title: Why Into the Wild Still Haunts Us
item.description: A deep dive into Sean Penn's Into the Wild — its visual philosophy, the McCandless myth, and why the film keeps pulling people toward the edge of civilization.
item.author: Shravan Goswami

item.title: The Allegory of the Cave and Our Modern Screens
item.description: Plato's cave allegory reinterpreted through the lens of social media, algorithmic feeds, and the pursuit of authentic understanding in a post-truth world.
item.author: Shravan Goswami

item.title: Random Thoughts on The Screen
item.description: A draft about what movies mean to me right now.
item.author: Jitendra Verma

item.title: Random Thoughts on Being and Time
item.description: A draft collecting some loose philosophical ideas.
item.author: Shravan Goswami

item.title: Back to the Arena: A New Chapter in 2026, From Open Source to Algorithms
item.description: My journey from inconsistent CP attempts to Open Source success, and why I'm returning to the algorithmic arena in my final semester.
item.author: Shravan Goswami

item.title: Google Summer of Code 2025: The Journey Begins
item.description: My GSoC 2025 journey begins with The Julia Language and Turing.jl! I’ll be building a browser-based interface for JuliaBUGS.
item.author: Shravan Goswami

item.title: B - Traveling Takahashi Problem (AtCoder Beginner Contest 375)
item.description: B - Traveling Takahashi Problem - Panasonic Programming Contest 2024 (AtCoder Beginner Contest 375)
item.author: Shravan Goswami

item.title: A. Seats (AtCoder Beginner Contest 375)
item.description: A. Seats - Panasonic Programming Contest 2024 (AtCoder Beginner Contest 375)
item.author: Shravan Goswami

item.title: A. Line Trip (CF1901 800 RATED)
item.description: A. Line Trip, 800 RATED - Educational Codeforces Round 158 (Rated for Div. 2)
item.author: Shravan Goswami

item.title: A. Halloumi Boxes (CF1903 800 RATED)
item.description: A. Halloumi Boxes, 800 RATED - Codeforces Round 912 (Div. 2)
item.author: Shravan Goswami

item.title: A. Consecutive Sum Riddle (CF1594 800 RATED)
item.description: A. Consecutive Sum Riddle, 800 RATED - Codeforces Round 747 (Div. 2)
item.author: Shravan Goswami
